RunLifecycleEnqueueStatus.description: Public route acknowledgement status, not run lifecycle authority.
RunLifecycleEnqueueStatus.title: RunLifecycleEnqueueStatus

RuntimeImageRef.description: Resolved runtime image reference accepted by the current sandbox contract.
RuntimeImageRef.title: RuntimeImageRef

actor_subtype.description: Actor subtype. Supported values are main, engineer, researcher, artifact_builder, artifact_reviewer, task_completion, run_completion, safety, objective, seraph, gardener; valid combinations depend on actor_type.

actor_type.description: Actor type. Supported values are orchestrator, reviewer, worker.

agent_model.description: Actor-scoped agent model override. Engineer-only models such as 'gpt-5.3-codex' and 'gpt-5.3-codex-spark' are only valid for 'worker:engineer'.

provider.description: Optional actor-scoped provider requirement. Use {'provider_id': 'deepseek'} to require an approved profile for that provider.
provider.title: Provider

SmrEmptyWorkspaceProjectRepoResponse.description: Explicit empty alternative before a project repository exists.
SmrEmptyWorkspaceProjectRepoResponse.title: SmrEmptyWorkspaceProjectRepoResponse

SmrEvidenceObligationsRequest.description: Explicit terminal evidence requirements for proof-bearing run lanes.
SmrEvidenceObligationsRequest.title: SmrEvidenceObligationsRequest

SmrFactoryTransitionRequest.description:
Body for the named lifecycle transitions (start/pause/resume/archive).

``dry_run=True`` is the preview: the reducer answers whether the
transition is legal and what it would change, without applying it.
SmrFactoryTransitionRequest.title: SmrFactoryTransitionRequest

split_role.description: Optimizer campaign split classification for benchmark resources. Use visible_train for proposer/search-visible resources and heldout for resources withheld until measurement.
split_role.title: Split Role

SmrProjectSetupAuthorityResponse.description: Canonical setup-authority response for the run-start control plane.
SmrProjectSetupAuthorityResponse.title: SmrProjectSetupAuthorityResponse

actor_image_overrides.description: Optional per-role runtime image release overrides keyed by orchestrator, worker, verifier, evaluator, or judge.
actor_image_overrides.title: Actor Image Overrides

actor_model_overrides.description: Deprecated compatibility input for actor-scoped model overrides keyed by actor_type and actor_subtype. Prefer roles for new integrations.
actor_model_overrides.title: Actor Model Overrides

agent_harness.description: Override the agent harness for this run. Supported public values are 'codex' and 'opencode_sdk'.
agent_harness.title: Agent Harness

agent_kind.description: Compatibility alias for agent_harness. Supported public values are 'codex' and 'opencode_sdk'.
agent_kind.title: Agent Kind

agent_model.description: Override one shared agent model for this run. Shared top-level values are 'baseten/zai-org/GLM-5.2', 'deepseek/deepseek-v4-flash', 'deepseek/deepseek-v4-flash-direct', 'deepseek/deepseek-v4-pro', 'deepseek/deepseek-v4-pro-direct', 'gpt-5.4', 'gpt-5.4-mini', 'gpt-5.5', 'gpt-5.6-luna', 'x-ai/grok-4.3', 'x-ai/grok-build'. Use actor_model_overrides for actor-specific model selection.

agent_model_params.description: Override agent model params for this run (for example {'reasoning_effort': 'medium'}).
agent_model_params.title: Agent Model Params

agent_profile.description: Override one shared agent profile ID for this run. Engineer-only profiles must be selected through actor_model_overrides for worker:engineer.
agent_profile.title: Agent Profile

ai_cache.description: Optional local-development run-scoped AI cache policy. When set, the runtime materializes actor model traffic through the requested cache base_url for this run only.
ai_cache.title: Ai Cache

dev_environment_id.description: Optional live DevEnvironment binding. When provided, backend validates the project-scoped dev environment and stamps launch_mode=dev_slot_execution onto the run contract.
dev_environment_id.title: Dev Environment Id

effort_id.description: Optional Research Factory Effort id. When present, the run is linked to that Effort and the Effort latest-run pointer is updated at launch.
effort_id.title: Effort Id

evidence_obligations.description: Explicit opt-in terminal evidence requirements for Factory and other proof-bearing run lanes. Ordinary runs leave this unset.

execution_policy.description: Optional run-scoped execution-policy overlay materialized in this run's immutable config snapshot.
execution_policy.title: Execution Policy

execution_profile.description: Typed product-owned execution profile for first-party Docker and Daytona launches. Backend validates host kind, runtime lane, repo binding, and materialized image or snapshot before dispatch.

execution_target.description: Explicit placement authority. Platform-resolved targets delegate all placement to Synth; bound-runtime targets carry one signed CloudDev binding and cannot restate host, pool, or source fields elsewhere.
execution_target.title: Execution Target

host_kind.description: Required run-level execution substrate. Supported values are docker, daytona.

image_override.description: Optional shorthand runtime image release override expanded to every otherwise unresolved actor role at run start.

initial_runtime_messages.description: Optional kickoff operator messages for this run. Each item is enqueued on the durable runtime message queue at launch (same contract as POST /smr/runs/{run_id}/runtime/messages). This is the supported way to attach opening intent; the legacy `prompt` field is not accepted.
initial_runtime_messages.title: Initial Runtime Messages

intended_horizon_hours.description: Customer-facing intended run horizon. Backend normalizes this to timebox_seconds and keeps runbook/profile/provider details internal.
intended_horizon_hours.title: Intended Horizon Hours

kickoff_contract.description: Optional staged-run kickoff contract. When provided, this becomes the authoritative staged contract for the run and is persisted on the run row.
kickoff_contract.title: Kickoff Contract

local_execution.description: Explicit local execution handoff from synth-dev. When present and requires_hosted_capacity=false, launch preflight uses slot-local capacity without hosted Codex pool blockers.

objective.description: Public launch shortcut for one queued kickoff objective message. Backend normalizes this into initial_runtime_messages before run start.
objective.title: Objective

provider_policy.description: Declarative provider routing preferences. Use agent_inference for agent actor traffic and experiment_inference for benchmark/eval model traffic. Defaults require ZDR and US domicile/region for OpenAI, Baseten, Gemini, and Grok-family providers.

providers.description: Run-scoped provider bindings. Supported public providers are openrouter, xai, tinker, synth_ai, cursor, deepseek, baseten, and openai_chatgpt.
providers.title: Providers

required_capabilities.description: Internal proof-lane capability requirement. Defaults to inference.
required_capabilities.title: Required Capabilities

roles.description: Role-based launch policy: explicit orchestrator/reviewer bindings plus worker palette and subtype overrides.

run_kind.description: Kind of work performed by a Factory-linked run. Maintenance runs start with an orchestrator that decides whether to stop early, act, or delegate stewardship work.
run_kind.title: Run Kind

run_policy.description: Optional run-scoped policy overlay controlling funding-source semantics, credential/tool/inference allowlists, and a total-cost cap for this run.

runbook.description: Typed orchestration posture for this run. Runbooks control collaboration behavior, not model selection.

runbook_config_id.description: Alias for runbook_preset used by SDK/MCP callers that select a backend-owned config.
runbook_config_id.title: Runbook Config Id

runbook_preset.description: Backend-owned launch preset id. Public research-preview presets are 'lite', 'standard', 'heavy', 'overnight', and 'continuous'.
runbook_preset.title: Runbook Preset

runtime_requirements.description: Run-scoped runtime requirements. Backend resolves these only against screened actor runtime image specs; arbitrary images are rejected.
runtime_requirements.title: Runtime Requirements

sandbox_override.description: Per-run sandbox image/snapshot override for Docker and Daytona hosts. Accepts {image: '...', snapshot: '...'} to override the project or env default. image takes precedence over snapshot.
sandbox_override.title: Sandbox Override

tool_config.description: Optional run-scoped tool configuration. Use this to explicitly scope runtime tool access, such as the GitHub repos allowed for this run.

work_mode.description: Run work mode override for this run.
work_mode.title: Work Mode

worker_pool_id.description: Optional per-run worker dispatch pool override. When omitted, the run uses the project's execution pool configuration.
worker_pool_id.title: Worker Pool Id

SmrResolvedActorProfilesResponse.description:
Platform-resolved actor execution for a hosted launch — no customer input.

Surfaces what the platform chose (orchestrator, reviewer, and worker
profiles) so history and dashboards never conflate requested vs
platform-chosen models.
SmrResolvedActorProfilesResponse.title: SmrResolvedActorProfilesResponse

SmrResolvedRunConfigurationResponse.description: Immutable, redacted configuration snapshot bound to one Research run.
SmrResolvedRunConfigurationResponse.title: SmrResolvedRunConfigurationResponse

SmrRunControlReceiptResponse.description:
Compact receipt for run lifecycle controls.

This is the write-side acknowledgement. Full run state remains available
through the run read endpoint so stop/pause/resume do not couple operator
latency to heavy projection hydration.
SmrRunControlReceiptResponse.title: SmrRunControlReceiptResponse

profile_last_observation_failure_evaluat.title: Profile Last Observation Failure Evaluation Point

resolution_policy.description: Only screened backend image specs may satisfy this requirement. Arbitrary image refs and image recipes are not supported yet.
resolution_policy.title: Resolution Policy

SmrSwarmActivityCursorResponse.description: Stable resume coordinates for bounded swarm activity.
SmrSwarmActivityCursorResponse.title: SmrSwarmActivityCursorResponse

SmrSwarmActivityResponse.description: Stable bounded execution activity for one public Research swarm.
SmrSwarmActivityResponse.title: SmrSwarmActivityResponse

SmrSwarmActivityWindowResponse.description: Requested and returned bounds for one activity snapshot.
SmrSwarmActivityWindowResponse.title: SmrSwarmActivityWindowResponse

SmrSwarmActorMoneyResponse.description: Cent-granular money attributed to one swarm actor.
SmrSwarmActorMoneyResponse.title: SmrSwarmActorMoneyResponse

SmrSwarmActorTokenUsageResponse.description: Token counts attributed to one swarm actor.
SmrSwarmActorTokenUsageResponse.title: SmrSwarmActorTokenUsageResponse

SmrSwarmActorUsageResponse.description: Customer-facing usage attributed to one actor.
SmrSwarmActorUsageResponse.title: SmrSwarmActorUsageResponse

SmrSwarmArtifactEvidenceResponse.description: One durable artifact advertised by a swarm evidence snapshot.
SmrSwarmArtifactEvidenceResponse.title: SmrSwarmArtifactEvidenceResponse

SmrSwarmEvidenceFreshnessResponse.description: Observable completeness and read time for durable swarm evidence.
SmrSwarmEvidenceFreshnessResponse.title: SmrSwarmEvidenceFreshnessResponse

SmrSwarmEvidenceResponse.description: Concise durable artifact and WorkProduct index for one swarm.
SmrSwarmEvidenceResponse.title: SmrSwarmEvidenceResponse

SmrSwarmStatusFailureResponse.description: Failure classification selected by the status projection.
SmrSwarmStatusFailureResponse.title: SmrSwarmStatusFailureResponse

SmrSwarmStatusFinalizationResponse.description: Finalization proof status projected by the terminal contract.
SmrSwarmStatusFinalizationResponse.title: SmrSwarmStatusFinalizationResponse

SmrSwarmStatusFreshnessResponse.description: Status projection freshness and read time.
SmrSwarmStatusFreshnessResponse.title: SmrSwarmStatusFreshnessResponse

SmrSwarmStatusInvariantResponse.description: One invariant violation summarized from typed projection diagnostics.
SmrSwarmStatusInvariantResponse.title: SmrSwarmStatusInvariantResponse

SmrSwarmStatusIssueResponse.description: One typed status issue without raw logs, traces, actors, or tasks.
SmrSwarmStatusIssueResponse.title: SmrSwarmStatusIssueResponse

SmrSwarmStatusIssuesResponse.description: Typed blockers and invariant summaries for status consumers.
SmrSwarmStatusIssuesResponse.title: SmrSwarmStatusIssuesResponse

SmrSwarmStatusLivenessResponse.description: Cheap liveness summary from the run status projection.
SmrSwarmStatusLivenessResponse.title: SmrSwarmStatusLivenessResponse

SmrSwarmStatusProgressResponse.description: Last compact progress signal exposed by the status projection.
SmrSwarmStatusProgressResponse.title: SmrSwarmStatusProgressResponse

SmrSwarmStatusRecoveryResponse.description: Run-closure recovery blocker summary without task or incident detail.
SmrSwarmStatusRecoveryResponse.title: SmrSwarmStatusRecoveryResponse

SmrSwarmStatusResponse.description:
Strict status projection for one public Research swarm.

See specifications/sdk/core_research_migration.md residual observability
disposition. This schema intentionally excludes actors, tasks, messages,
artifacts, WorkProducts, logs, and traces.
SmrSwarmStatusResponse.title: SmrSwarmStatusResponse

SmrSwarmStatusStateResponse.description: Authoritative public state for one Research swarm.
SmrSwarmStatusStateResponse.title: SmrSwarmStatusStateResponse

SmrSwarmStatusTerminalResponse.description: Terminal contract outcome projected by status_projection.
SmrSwarmStatusTerminalResponse.title: SmrSwarmStatusTerminalResponse

SmrSwarmTokenCountsResponse.description: Token counts for one swarm or model.
SmrSwarmTokenCountsResponse.title: SmrSwarmTokenCountsResponse

SmrSwarmTokenUsageResponse.description: Typed token rollup for a swarm.
SmrSwarmTokenUsageResponse.title: SmrSwarmTokenUsageResponse

SmrSwarmUsageFreshnessResponse.description: Observable freshness and authority of a swarm usage projection.
SmrSwarmUsageFreshnessResponse.title: SmrSwarmUsageFreshnessResponse

SmrSwarmUsageMoneyResponse.description: Exact monetary usage totals for a public swarm readout.
SmrSwarmUsageMoneyResponse.title: SmrSwarmUsageMoneyResponse

SmrSwarmUsageResponse.description: Concise typed usage summary for one swarm.
SmrSwarmUsageResponse.title: SmrSwarmUsageResponse

SmrSwarmWorkProductArtifactLinkResponse.description: Typed artifact binding retained by one WorkProduct.
SmrSwarmWorkProductArtifactLinkResponse.title: SmrSwarmWorkProductArtifactLinkResponse

SmrSwarmWorkProductBlockerResponse.description: Stable reason that a WorkProduct is not currently consumable.
SmrSwarmWorkProductBlockerResponse.title: SmrSwarmWorkProductBlockerResponse

SmrSwarmWorkProductEvidenceResponse.description: One typed WorkProduct advertised by a swarm evidence snapshot.
SmrSwarmWorkProductEvidenceResponse.title: SmrSwarmWorkProductEvidenceResponse

SmrTranscriptCursorResponse.description: Opaque exclusive cursor contract for replay and live handoff.
SmrTranscriptCursorResponse.title: SmrTranscriptCursorResponse

SmrTranscriptFreshnessResponse.description: Read time and authority for one transcript projection.
SmrTranscriptFreshnessResponse.title: SmrTranscriptFreshnessResponse

SmrTranscriptPageResponse.description: Versioned transcript page with explicit freshness and cursor semantics.
SmrTranscriptPageResponse.title: SmrTranscriptPageResponse

SmrTranscriptParticipantResponse.description: Current or archived participant represented in a transcript page.
SmrTranscriptParticipantResponse.title: SmrTranscriptParticipantResponse

agent_harness.description: Optional default worker harness used when subtype override is omitted.
agent_harness.title: Agent Harness

default_model.description: Default worker model when subtype override is omitted.

TranscriptCursorKind.description: Opaque cursor namespace returned by a transcript page.
TranscriptCursorKind.title: TranscriptCursorKind

TranscriptProjectionAuthority.description: Backend authority used to serve one transcript page.
TranscriptProjectionAuthority.title: TranscriptProjectionAuthority

TranscriptReplayMode.description: Ordering domain used by transcript page cursors.
TranscriptReplayMode.title: TranscriptReplayMode
